case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. TENNESSEE ZADIE BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, TENNESSEE ZADIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2003

RE WAIVER OF ALL ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED FEB-11-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, TENNESSEE ZADIE
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL NOTICE OF OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $142.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, TENNESSEE ZADIE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
